name: Terminal Run Command
description: Execute a command in the terminal by typing it and pressing Enter

inputs.name: Session
inputs.description: Terminal session from Terminal Session node

outputs.name: Output
outputs.description: Terminal output after running the command

outputs.name: Screenshot
outputs.description: Screenshot of terminal after command execution

properties.name: Command
properties.description: Command to execute in the terminal

properties.name: Wait After (ms)
properties.description: Time to wait after pressing Enter before reading output

properties.name: Take Screenshot
properties.description: Capture a screenshot after the command runs

compiler.template: {{outputVar}} = await Terminal.runCommand({{session}}, {{#if command}}{{command}}{{else}}{{json commandText}}{{/if}}, { waitMs: {{waitMs}}, takeScreenshot: {{takeScreenshot}} }, '{{nodeId}}'); let {{outputVar}}_session = {{outputVar}}.session; let {{outputVar}}_output = {{outputVar}}.output; let {{outputVar}}_screenshot = {{outputVar}}.screenshot

doc:
# Terminal Run Command

Simple command execution in a terminal session. Types the command and presses Enter.

## Properties

- **Command**: The command to type and execute
- **Wait After**: Time to wait for command to complete
- **Take Screenshot**: Enable to capture terminal state after execution

## Usage

Connect a Terminal Session node to the session input, then specify the command to run.

```
[Terminal Session] --> [Terminal Run Command: "ls -la"]
                                    |
                                    v
                               [output, screenshot]
```
